query:
INSERT INTO courses (slug, nameEn, nameZh, taglineEn, taglineZh, descriptionEn, descriptionZh, category, targetAudienceEn, targetAudienceZh, icon, themeColor, displayOrder, highlights) VALUES
('coaching-partner', 'Coaching Partner', '教练合伙人', 'Become an AI-empowered coaching partner, build your coaching business', '成为AI赋能的教练合伙人，构建你的教练事业', 'A comprehensive program designed to transform professionals into certified AI coaching partners. Learn coaching methodologies, AI-powered tools, and business model design to build a sustainable coaching practice.', '全方位培养AI教练合伙人的旗舰课程。从教练方法论、AI工具应用到商业模式设计，系统化构建可持续的教练事业。', 'coaching', 'Aspiring coaches, consultants, trainers', '有志成为教练的专业人士、咨询师、培训师', '🎯', '#A88B52', 1, '[{"en":"ICF-aligned coaching methodology","zh":"ICF认证教练方法论"},{"en":"AI-powered coaching toolkit","zh":"AI驱动的教练工具箱"},{"en":"Business model design for coaches","zh":"教练商业模式设计"},{"en":"Practice with real clients","zh":"真实客户实战演练"}]'),

('ip-evolution', 'IP Evolution Theory', 'IP进化论', 'Build and evolve your personal brand into a powerful IP asset', '打造并进化你的个人品牌，成为强大的IP资产', 'Learn the science and art of personal branding in the AI era. From content strategy to audience building, master the frameworks that turn expertise into influential intellectual property.', '在AI时代掌握个人品牌打造的科学与艺术。从内容策略到受众构建，系统化将专业能力转化为有影响力的知识产权。', 'knowledge', 'Content creators, experts, consultants', '内容创作者、行业专家、咨询顾问', '🧬', '#EC4899', 2, '[{"en":"Personal brand positioning framework","zh":"个人品牌定位框架"},{"en":"AI-assisted content creation","zh":"AI辅助内容创作"},{"en":"Monetization strategy design","zh":"变现策略设计"},{"en":"Cross-platform IP management","zh":"跨平台IP管理"}]'),

('new-media-practitioner', 'New Media Practitioner', '新媒体实战派', 'Master new media operations with AI-driven content strategies', '用AI驱动的内容策略掌握新媒体运营', 'A hands-on program covering all aspects of new media operations. From short video production to live streaming, social media management to AI content generation, become a versatile new media professional.', '覆盖新媒体运营全链路的实战课程。从短视频制作到直播运营，从社交媒体管理到AI内容生成，成为全能型新媒体人才。', 'media', 'Media professionals, marketers, entrepreneurs', '媒体从业者、营销人员、创业者', '📱', '#8B5CF6', 3, '[{"en":"Short video production mastery","zh":"短视频制作精通"},{"en":"AI content generation workflows","zh":"AI内容生成工作流"},{"en":"Live streaming operations","zh":"直播运营实战"},{"en":"Data-driven growth hacking","zh":"数据驱动增长黑客"}]'),

('knowledge-asset', 'Knowledge Assetization', '知识资产化', 'Transform your expertise into scalable digital knowledge assets', '将你的专业知识转化为可规模化的数字知识资产', 'Learn to systematize, package, and monetize your professional knowledge. This program covers knowledge management, course design, digital product creation, and AI-assisted knowledge delivery systems.', '学习系统化、产品化和变现你的专业知识。课程涵盖知识管理、课程设计、数字产品创建和AI辅助知识交付系统。', 'knowledge', 'Subject matter experts, educators, authors', '领域专家、教育工作者、作者', '📚', '#059669', 4, '[{"en":"Knowledge systematization framework","zh":"知识体系化框架"},{"en":"Digital course design methodology","zh":"数字课程设计方法论"},{"en":"AI-powered knowledge delivery","zh":"AI驱动的知识交付"},{"en":"Passive income model design","zh":"被动收入模式设计"}]'),

('opc-startup-101', 'OPC Startup Enlightenment', 'OPC创业启蒙', 'Discover the one-person company model and start your entrepreneurial journey', '探索一人公司模式，开启你的创业之旅', 'An introductory program for aspiring solopreneurs. Understand the OPC philosophy, learn lean startup principles adapted for individuals, and design your first viable one-person business model with AI assistance.', '面向有志创业者的入门课程。理解OPC哲学，学习适合个人的精益创业原则，借助AI设计你的第一个可行的一人公司商业模式。', 'startup', 'Aspiring entrepreneurs, career changers', '有志创业者、职业转型者', '🚀', '#F59E0B', 5, '[{"en":"OPC philosophy and mindset","zh":"OPC哲学与心态"},{"en":"Lean startup for individuals","zh":"个人精益创业"},{"en":"AI-assisted business model design","zh":"AI辅助商业模式设计"},{"en":"First revenue generation plan","zh":"首次营收生成计划"}]'),

('champion-lobster', 'Champion Lobster Course', '冠军龙虾课', 'Master the art and science of premium lobster cuisine and business', '掌握高端龙虾料理与商业运营的艺术与科学', 'A unique program combining culinary excellence with business acumen. Learn premium lobster preparation techniques, restaurant operations, brand building, and AI-powered supply chain management.', '融合烹饪卓越与商业智慧的独特课程。学习高端龙虾制作技术、餐饮运营管理、品牌建设和AI驱动的供应链管理。', 'business', 'Food entrepreneurs, restaurant owners, chefs', '餐饮创业者、餐厅经营者、厨师', '🦞', '#EF4444', 6, '[{"en":"Premium lobster cuisine mastery","zh":"高端龙虾料理精通"},{"en":"Restaurant operations excellence","zh":"餐饮运营卓越"},{"en":"Brand building for F&B","zh":"餐饮品牌建设"},{"en":"AI-powered supply chain","zh":"AI驱动供应链管理"}]'),

('champion-enterprise-ai', 'Champion Enterprise AI Transformation', '冠军企业 AI 转型课', 'Lead your enterprise through AI transformation with proven frameworks', '用经过验证的框架引领企业AI转型', 'A comprehensive enterprise program designed for business leaders. Learn to assess AI readiness, design transformation roadmaps, implement AI solutions, and manage organizational change for sustainable competitive advantage.', '面向企业领导者的全面AI转型课程。学习评估AI就绪度、设计转型路线图、实施AI解决方案和管理组织变革，构建可持续竞争优势。', 'enterprise', 'CEOs, CTOs, business leaders, managers', 'CEO、CTO、企业领导者、管理者', '🏆', '#0A1626', 7, '[{"en":"AI readiness assessment framework","zh":"AI就绪度评估框架"},{"en":"Transformation roadmap design","zh":"转型路线图设计"},{"en":"AI solution implementation","zh":"AI解决方案实施"},{"en":"Change management for AI adoption","zh":"AI采纳变革管理"}]');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user oHUr3BHUoKwB4Kn.3b4be3802539 --database TLS2wRZtDwCNNv8psiMfTi --execute
